ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the worker's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the worker (e.g., worker, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the worker account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the worker account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the worker last logged in */,
  "total_time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent by the worker on tasks */,
  "average_productivity" REAL /* Average productivity of the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for the task in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the task belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_spent" (
  "time_spent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time spent entry */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who spent time on the task */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the task in minutes */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the time was spent */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the task */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_spent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_spent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_spent_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_open" (
  "time_open_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time open entry */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who spent time on administrative tasks */,
  "time_open" INTEGER /* Time spent on administrative tasks in minutes */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the time was spent */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the administrative task */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the administrative task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_open_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experimental group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experimental group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_experimental_groups" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned to the group */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental group */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_experimental_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES experimental_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_experimental_groups_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the task category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_roles" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the worker */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fb_dates" (
  "fb_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fb date entry */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "fb_date" TEXT /* Date when the worker was last active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fb date entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fb date entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fb_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_experiments" (
  "admin_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin experiment */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who created the experiment */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental group */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_admin_experiments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned to the admin experiment */,
  "admin_experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin experiment */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_productivity" (
  "task_productivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task productivity entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "productivity" REAL /* Productivity of the worker on the task */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the productivity was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_productivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_productivity_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_productivity_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_productivity" (
  "worker_productivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker productivity entry */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "productivity" REAL /* Productivity of the worker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the productivity was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_productivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_productivity_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_group_productivity" (
  "experimental_group_productivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental group productivity entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental group */,
  "productivity" REAL /* Productivity of the experimental group */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the productivity was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimental_group_productivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_group_productivity_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES experimental_groups ("group_id")
)
